mapper.insert: INSERT INTO t_evaluation_dataset (tenant_id, dataset_id, name, description, item_count, source, created_at, updated_at) VALUES (#{tenantId}, #{datasetId}, #{name}, #{description}, #{itemCount}, #{source}, NOW(), NOW())
mapper.update: UPDATE t_evaluation_dataset SET name = #{name}, description = #{description}, item_count = #{itemCount}, source = #{source}, updated_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE t_evaluation_dataset SET deleted = 1, updated_at = NOW() WHERE dataset_id = #{datasetId}
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM t_evaluation_dataset WHERE dataset_id = #{datasetId} AND deleted = 0
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM t_evaluation_dataset WHERE tenant_id = #{tenantId} AND deleted = 0
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO t_evaluation_dataset_item (dataset_id, question, expected_answer, retrieval_context, metadata_json, created_at) VALUES (#{datasetId}, #{question}, #{expectedAnswer}, #{retrievalContext}, #{metadataJson}, NOW())
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM t_evaluation_dataset_item WHERE dataset_id = #{datasetId} ORDER BY id ASC
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM t_evaluation_dataset_item WHERE dataset_id = #{datasetId}
